prospectusExcerpt:
PROSPECTUS — HARBOUR INFRASTRUCTURE BOND TOKEN (HIBT)
SFC-Authorised Corporate Bond | Series 2026-B

════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
ISSUER & ELIGIBILITY
════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Issuer: Harbour Capital Markets Corporation Limited
SFC Licence: Type 1 (Dealing in Securities) and Type 6 (Advising on Corporate Finance)
under the Securities and Futures Ordinance (SFO) Cap. 571.
The issuer is a licensed corporation authorised to deal in tokenised debt securities
pursuant to SFO s.103 and the SFC Circular on Tokenisation of SFC-authorised
Investment Products (November 2023).

Credit Rating: Moody's A2 / S&P A (Stable Outlook)
Incorporated in Singapore.

════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
BOND TERMS & STRU
approvedBy: Ms. Wong Mei-Ling, SFC Senior Director
